case_title: ALI, KARIMAH vs. MCGLOTHIN, LEE ARTHUR et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALI, KARIMAH AS TO DEFENDANT MCGLOTHIN, LEE ARTHUR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-28-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-27-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-08-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-28-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-28-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), AND WHY COURT SHOULD NOT DISMISS CASE OR TAKE OTHER ACTION. HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MCGLOTHIN, LEE ARTHUR
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-27-1995, OFF CALENDAR O/C - DISMISSAL FILED ON SEPT 7, 1995.
